sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96039" key="spondeiopu/rrixos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδειο-πύρρῐχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a foot consisting of spondee and pyrrhic</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ionicus a majore</tr_>, Id.ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">305</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
